USGS.Earthquakes.Event.name: Event
USGS.Earthquakes.Event.description: USGS earthquake event data from the Earthquake Hazards Program.

USGS.Earthquakes.Event.name: Event
USGS.Earthquakes.Event.description: USGS earthquake event data from the Earthquake Hazards Program.

schema.name: Event
schema.doc: USGS earthquake event data from the Earthquake Hazards Program.

fields.name: id
fields.doc: Unique identifier for the earthquake event.

fields.name: magnitude
fields.doc: Magnitude of the earthquake.

fields.name: mag_type
fields.doc: Method or algorithm used to calculate the magnitude (e.g. ml, md, mb, mww).

fields.name: place
fields.doc: Textual description of the named geographic region near the event.

fields.name: event_time
fields.doc: Time of the earthquake event in ISO-8601 format.

fields.name: updated
fields.doc: Time when the event was most recently updated in ISO-8601 format.

fields.name: url
fields.doc: Link to USGS Event Page for this event.

fields.name: detail_url
fields.doc: Link to GeoJSON detail feed for this event.

fields.name: felt
fields.doc: Number of felt reports submitted to the DYFI system.

fields.name: cdi
fields.doc: Maximum reported community determined intensity (DYFI).

fields.name: mmi
fields.doc: Maximum estimated instrumental intensity (ShakeMap).

fields.name: alert
fields.doc: PAGER alert level (green, yellow, orange, red).

fields.name: status
fields.doc: Review status of the event (automatic, reviewed, deleted).

fields.name: tsunami
fields.doc: Flag indicating whether the event has a tsunami advisory (1=yes, 0=no).

fields.name: sig
fields.doc: Significance of the event, a number describing how significant the event is (0-1000).

fields.name: net
fields.doc: ID of the data contributor network.

fields.name: code
fields.doc: Identifying code assigned by the corresponding source for the event.

fields.name: sources
fields.doc: Comma-separated list of network contributors.

fields.name: nst
fields.doc: Number of seismic stations used to determine earthquake location.

fields.name: dmin
fields.doc: Horizontal distance from the epicenter to the nearest station (degrees).

fields.name: rms
fields.doc: Root-mean-square travel time residual (seconds).

fields.name: gap
fields.doc: Largest azimuthal gap between azimuthally adjacent stations (degrees).

fields.name: event_type
fields.doc: Type of seismic event (earthquake, quarry blast, etc.).

fields.name: latitude
fields.doc: Latitude of the earthquake epicenter in decimal degrees.

fields.name: longitude
fields.doc: Longitude of the earthquake epicenter in decimal degrees.

fields.name: depth
fields.doc: Depth of the earthquake in kilometers.
